data.title: Fix FractalPattern not rendering (stacking + var() color)

data.body: Pre-existing site-wide bug: FractalPattern wallpaper is invisible on all 8 pages that use it. Cause: the layer is 'absolute inset-0 -z-10' but each page's <main> is position:relative with NO stacking context, so the -z-10 escapes to the root and paints BEHIND <main>'s opaque background. Fix: change FractalPattern's wrapper -z-10 -> z-0 (one-file fix; paints above the page bg, below the z-10 content wrapper that every page uses). Also fix a today-introduced latent issue: FRAC-203 (PoliticalClubPage) and FRAC-204 (PeoplePage) pass color=var(--...) to FractalPattern, but var() does NOT resolve in SVG presentation attributes (stroke=/fill=) — repoint those to the real hex from the data model (HOUSES forum palette.light / SECTIONS.people.deep). (Story's equivalent fix is in frac-205.) Off master.

Re-scoped + deferred: the z-index stacking fix folded into FRAC-205. FRAC-206 now covers ONLY the remaining var()->real-hex fix for FractalPattern color on PoliticalClubPage + PeoplePage (both merged but hidden from launch, so not user-visible). Do later off master as a small PR. Moving to backlog.
